facebook.caption: If you're looking for a sit-down meal that feels genuinely local on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Anna's Nhà Cuốn Restaurant is worth a stop. The name says it all — 'nhà cuốn' means rolling house, pointing straight to Vietnamese fresh rolls as the heart of the menu. With a 4.7/5 rating across 340 reviews, this spot has clearly won over plenty of travelers. Come hungry, go slow, and don't skip the dipping sauces.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the table fill up with fresh rolls, herbs, and dipping bowls at Anna's Nhà Cuốn Restaurant. This is hands-on eating at its best, wrapping, dipping, and discovering flavors that are hard to find back home. One of the most consistently loved spots on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, and the 4.7-star rating from 340 reviewers backs that up.

instagram.caption: Fresh rolls, fragrant herbs, and a 4.7-star reputation. Anna's Nhà Cuốn Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is your sign to eat local tonight. Practical tip: come with an appetite and a little patience, good things take a moment to wrap.
instagram.video_caption: Rolling, wrapping, dipping. Anna's Nhà Cuốn Restaurant puts the fun right in your hands. One of Phu Quoc's most loved local dining spots and honestly, the food speaks for itself.

tiktok.caption: This little restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo just hits different. Anna's Nhà Cuốn Restaurant, 4.7 stars, 340 reviews, and you can taste why. #PhuQuoc #VietnameseFood #FreshRolls #PhuQuocFood

scenes: Fresh herbs, rice paper, dipping sauce
Wrap it, dip it, love it
